finding_title: 依赖、CI Action、SBOM 与权限最小化未形成供应链基线
summary: Adds deterministic local SBOM extraction and project-governance CI enforcement for the A-020 supply-chain baseline while preserving all production stop gates.
scope: Local deterministic SBOM summary for ADP dependency files, fail-closed CI gate requiring test_security_boundary.py on push/PR/changed-only paths, workflow permission/action audit, and vulnerability exception gate.
non_scope: No real SMTP enablement, scheduler installation, Release upload, public schema change, DB migration, source adapter change, ranking change, production queue mutation, CURRENT pointer change, V7.1/V7.2 contract-file edit, inherited P0/P1 closure, S2PMT07 final pass, integrated production acceptance, or daily operation enablement.

rules: dependency contents are required and parsed into a deterministic local SBOM summary.
permissions: write-all and write-scoped workflow permissions are forbidden for the ADP local supply-chain baseline.
external GitHub Action references must be commit-SHA pinned or explicitly approved as mutable with rationale.
high and critical vulnerability findings require approved_by, expires_at, and rationale before the gate can pass.

validation: py_compile: PASS for security_boundary.py, A-020 tests, final-gate tests, user-center test, and project-governance validator test
root governance A-020 workflow test: 1 OK
remaining_blockers: Inherited V7.1 P0=8 and P1=37 remain open until independent final S2PMT07 review accepts remediation evidence.
S2PLT04, final acceptance bundle, independent final signoff, and independent final command execution remain blocking production acceptance.
This manifest does not run online vulnerability databases, install production workflows, send SMTP, or claim INTEGRATED_PRODUCTION_ACCEPTED.
rollback: Revert security_boundary.py SBOM/CI gate code, project-governance CI step, tests, this manifest, A-020 technical review receipt updates, and governance/user-center traceability records; no production state was changed.
